core_principles: Precision Engineering: Every pixel aligned, every interaction deliberate.
Industrial Clarity: High contrast, no fluff, data-first.
Trust through Structure: Rigid grids that imply stability and reliability.
Safety Orange Accents: Use the accent color like safety warnings - sparingly but effectively.
design_philosophy.vibe: Reliable, robust, precise, and technologically advanced. Not 'dusty old factory' but 'modern automated logistics center'.

typography.installation: Import Manrope and Inter from Google Fonts in the CSS file.

primary.name: Deep Industrial Navy
primary.usage: Hero backgrounds, Footer, Primary Text, Strong Borders

secondary.name: Steel Gray
secondary.usage: Secondary text, Borders, Icons, Subtle backgrounds

accent.name: Safety Orange
accent.usage: Primary CTAs, Sale Badges, Hover states, Key highlights

buttons.primary: bg-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-700 text-white font-semibold py-3 px-8 rounded-md shadow-lg shadow-orange-900/20 transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:translate-y-0
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:border-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 font-medium py-3 px-8 rounded-md transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-orange-600 font-medium px-4 py-2 hover:bg-orange-50 rounded-md transition-colors

cards.product: group relative bg-white border border-slate-200 hover:border-orange-500/50 hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-slate-200/50 transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden
cards.service: bg-slate-50 border border-slate-100 p-8 hover:bg-white hover:shadow-md transition-all
cards.bento_item: bg-white border border-slate-200 p-8 flex flex-col justify-between hover:border-slate-300 transition-colors

inputs.default: flex h-12 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-orange-600 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.sale: bg-orange-100 text-orange-700 text-xs font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded-full uppercase tracking-wide
badges.new: bg-slate-900 text-white text-xs font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded-full uppercase tracking-wide

assets.icons: Lucide React (already installed). Use clear, geometric icons (e.g., Scale, Settings, Truck, Phone, Search, Menu, ChevronDown).

header.elements: Logo (White text), Nav Links (Hover orange), Phone (Bold white), CTA (Orange Button)

hero.layout: Split screen or Centered with heavy background overlay.
hero.content: Headline: 'Precision You Can Trust' (in Czech: 'Přesnost, na kterou se můžete spolehnout'). Subhead: Industrial scales and calibration services for modern business.

bento_grid.layout: Grid cols 1 md:cols-3 lg:cols-4 gap-4 auto-rows-[300px]

motion.scroll_reveal: initial={{opacity: 0, y: 20}} whileInView={{opacity: 1, y: 0}} viewport={{once: true}}

accessibility.contrast: Ensure Orange text is only used on Dark backgrounds or as buttons. On white background, use Orange only for graphical elements, not body text.
accessibility.aria: All icon-only buttons must have aria-label. Images must have alt text.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Shadcn UI first. Install button, card, input, form, select, sheet (for mobile menu), separator.
2. Configure Tailwind with the specific colors defined above.
3. Create the 'Layout' component with the sticky header and footer.
4. Build the 'Hero' section using the dark theme strategy.
5. Implement the 'Bento Grid' for categories - this is the visual centerpiece.
6. Use 'Lucide-react' icons for all UI elements.
7. Ensure the Contact form uses proper validation (Zod + React Hook Form).
8. TRANSLATE ALL CONTENT TO CZECH as per requirements.
9. Use the provided image URLs. Do not use placeholders.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts everywhere. Use asymmetry.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid.
